creator: kevinxlinuz@163.com
text:
xf86-video-nouveau fail to build with libdrm-2.4.5. Everything is newest.
 cc -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I. -I.. -I/usr/local/include/xorg -I/usr/local/include/pixman-1 -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include/drm -I/usr/local/include/X11/dri -O2 -pipe -march=nocona -fno-strict-aliasing -Wall -minline-all-stringops -I/usr/local/include/xorg -I/usr/local/include/pixman-1 -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include/drm -I/usr/local/include/X11/dri -MT nv_dri.lo -MD -MP -MF .deps/nv_dri.Tpo -c nv_dri.c  -fPIC -DPIC -o .libs/nv_dri.o
nv_dri.c:263:2: error: #error nouveau_drm.h does not match expected patchlevel, update libdrm.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/x11-drivers/xf86-video-nouveau/work/xf86-video-nouveau-0.0.10.20090129/src.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/x11-drivers/xf86-video-nouveau/work/xf86-video-nouveau-0.0.10.20090129.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/x11-drivers/xf86-video-nouveau/work/xf86-video-nouveau-0.0.10.20090129.
*** Error code 1

How-To-Repeat: update libdrm
